name: Shrimp and Artichoke Hearts San Benedetto Style
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Medium shrimp; raw in shells
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Christmas Memories with Recipes (Edward Giobbi)
1. Cook the shrimp in boiling water for 3 to 5 minutes, or until pink and just firm to the touch. Drain at once.
2. When cool, shell and devein them.
3. Slice the shrimp into pieces about 1/4 inch thick and set aside.
4. Drain the artichokes and chop into pieces no coarser than rough-cut breadcrumbs.
5. Combine the shrimp and artichokes with the remaining ingredients and mix well.
6. Serve at room temperature.
